title: Applied Generators
description: Adds FE generators for AE2. Also adds FE Storage and some functional blocks.
body:
Applied Generators adds FE generators for AE2.

- Singularity Generator - generate FE by consuming singularities.
- Flux Generator - continuously generate FE at a constant speed.

This also adds FE Storage and some functional blocks.

- Flux Cell - can store FE like chests.
- Genesis Synthesizer - add recipes for this mod items or some AE2 items.
- Pattern Buffer - can store items which are ingredients in a pattern.
- Smelter - can smelt items using AE instead of fuels.
